title: Smoked Haddock Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful fritter filled with the rich taste of smoked haddock. Best served with a side of lemon wedges and tartar sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the flaked smoked haddock, sifted flour, soaked onion, beaten egg, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
2. Heat the melted butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the haddock mixture into the skillet.
4. Flatten the mixture slightly and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
5. Serve the fritters hot with lemon wedges and tartar sauce.
